understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` in each level while avoiding spike tiles, using limited attempts and steps per level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement commands (MOVE_LEFT, MOVE_RIGHT, etc.) shift the player position on the grid. Gravity (DOWN here) impacts vertical movement. Each move consumes steps. Landing on spikes ends the run, and failed attempts restart the level with an appended failure record.
